headline.purpose: Page-level view titles; 700 weight, slight negative tracking.

title.purpose: Compact panel and section headings; 600 weight.

label.purpose: Field labels and compact UI metadata; 600/12px.

shadows.name: resting-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards, panels, form surfaces — a whisper of depth off the warm canvas.

shadows.name: flat-at-rest
shadows.purpose: Rows, list items, and field groups inside a card.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Apple ease-out for control state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Purple command button for the single primary action in a surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #4534b3; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #5645d4, #4534b3); color: #ffffff; font: 600 15px var(--font-sans, "PingFang SC", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4534b3, #3a2a99); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5645d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral supporting button — refresh, preview, diagnostics, and all non-primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #c8c4be; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #37352f; font: 600 15px var(--font-sans, "PingFang SC", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), border-color 180ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #fafaf9; border-color: #c8c4be; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5645d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card Panel
components.description: Flat white working panel on the warm canvas; structure via hairline, not shadow.
components.css: .ds-panel { max-width: 520px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #e5e3df; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #37352f; box-shadow: none; } .ds-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 12px; color: #1a1a1a; font: 600 16px/1.35 var(--font-sans, "PingFang SC", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; padding: 10px 0; border-top: 1px solid #e5e3df; } .ds-row span { color: #5d5b54; } .ds-row strong { color: #1a1a1a; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Compact working field with purple focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; color: #5d5b54; font: 600 12px/1.2 var(--font-sans, "PingFang SC", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-field input { min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid #c8c4be; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #37352f; font: 400 15px/1.55 var(--font-sans, "PingFang SC", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: #5645d4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #ece8fb; outline: 0; }

components.name: Grouped Light Dock
components.description: Persistent light grouped navigation dock (Workspace / Operations) with purple active state.
components.html: 工作区
components.css: .ds-nav { display: grid; gap: 2px; width: 240px; padding: 16px; background: #f7f6f4; } .ds-nav-group { padding: 12px 10px 6px; color: #8c8983; font: 600 12px var(--font-sans, "PingFang SC", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-nav-item { min-height: 34px; padding: 7px 10px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; text-align: left; color: #37352f; background: transparent; font: 500 15px var(--font-sans, "PingFang SC", Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #ebe9e5; } .ds-nav-item.ds-active { color: #3a2a99; background: #ece8fb; }

components.name: Notion Callout (empty state)
components.description: Soft-tint block with a leading icon chip and caption + message; teaches the empty state. Replaces dashed placeholders.
components.html: 清爽暂时没有需要处理的信号。

components.name: Multi-color Tag
components.description: Notion pastel select pills; backgrounds rotate lavender/mint/peach/sky/rose/yellow by position, warm-ink text at AA.

components.name: Status Badge (with dot)
components.description: Pastel pill + leading same-color status dot + deep semantic text; status carried by dot+label, never color alone.

components.name: Nav / Page Icon Chip
components.description: Lucide-style line SVG (currentColor, 1.9 stroke): 17px in nav, 22px in the accent-soft page-head chip; signal chips tint by state.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Muted slash-separated wayfinding trail at the page top; last segment emphasized. Quiet, not colored pills.

narrative.overview: ThreadTrace should feel like a private cockpit for a young technical operator: sharp, credible, and satisfying to use without falling into hacker theatrics. Built on a Notion + Apple blend — Notion provides the bones (workspace structure, warm-neutral surfaces, a purple primary, sober rectangular geometry, database-property color for status); Apple provides the polish (typographic restraint, generous breathing room, committed micro-interactions, shadows reserved for floating layers only).
keyCharacteristics: Built for one expert operator moving quickly.

rules.name: The Purple Is The Action Rule
rules.body: Purple belongs to operations, selection, and focus. Don't use it for body text or large surfaces. Secondary actions stay neutral.

rules.name: The Gold Is A Mark Rule
rules.body: Gold is reserved for brand/logo moments only — prohibited as a UI or CTA color.

rules.name: The No Single-Color Rule
rules.body: Purple is the operational accent, not the whole personality; warmth and life come from neutrals, link blue, and pastel tints.

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Ladder is 400 / 500 / 600 / 700. Weight 800+ is banned — it reads as shouting, not hierarchy.

rules.name: The Apple-Tight Rule
rules.body: Display/large headings carry slight negative letter-spacing; product type stays at fixed rem, never fluid clamp.

rules.name: The Structural Depth Rule
rules.body: Shadows must clarify a floating layer or interaction. If a shadow only makes the UI look expensive, remove it. No inner-highlight glass on static surfaces.

dos: Keep the UI young, sharp, and personally useful.
Use deliberate color roles: light dock, warm canvas, purple action, link blue, pastel status, gold identity.
Preserve evidence density with easy-to-scan rows, labels, and panel titles.
Make source operations, review flows, and analysis feel like one coherent cockpit.
Keep focus states visible and keyboard-friendly; every animation has a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
donts: Don't look like a generic admin template or an ordinary enterprise system with default white cards.
Don't use dark hacker-terminal styling, neon, or fake command-center drama.
Don't collapse the product into a single-color theme.
Don't use loud AI-SaaS tropes: gradient text, gradient blobs, decorative multi-color bars, marketing-first hero layouts.
Don't use 01/02/03 numbered scaffolding, per-section eyebrow kickers, or border-left/right color stripes greater than 1px.
Don't use weight 800+, fluid clamp headings, or inner-highlight glass on static surfaces.
